notes: The real Electron app was in the launch path, not the plain browser renderer.
OpenNOW showed the ad-required queue overlay with placeholder copy and queue position #110.
No active ad media source was attached to the visible video element at capture time.
No ready-transition capture file was written during a 90-check monitor window, so the session did not reach status 2 or 3 during observation.
